name: WeCommerce Holdings Ltd.
summary: WeCommerce Holdings Ltd. is private equity and venture capital firm specializing in startups, and buyout. It operates as a holding company that owns a family of companies and brands in the Shopify partner ecosystem, including Pixel Union, Out of the Sandbox, Yopify, SuppleApps, Rehash, and Foursixty. WeCommerce Holdings Ltd. is based in Victoria, Canada.
